--- 
title: "TAPS 2026 National Workshop"
author: ""
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
---

# Welcome 


Workshop notes and R code for Design of Experiments for the TAPS national workshop at Kansas State University on April 2, 2026.

See Workshop notes and R code for Spatial and Time-series Analysis for the TAPS national workshop at Kansas State University on April 2, 2026 [here](https://019d4be5-1940-b4d4-bf2f-01c12b4cc2a8.share.connect.posit.cloud/index.html).
